name: Tomato and Basil Pesto
recipeIngredient: Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the tomatoes and cut in half.
2. Grill over very hot coals for a few minutes, or use the oven broiler if no hot coals are available, until some color and flavor develop. Remove from heat and set aside to cool.
3. Add basil, parsley, and garlic to a food processor and process until smooth.
4. Add tomato, vinegar, and lemon juice; process again.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste. (Some prefer no salt and more black pepper.)
